Class Player

java.lang.Object
generation.characters.Character
generation.characters.Player
public class Player extends Character
Represents a player in the game with score, lives, and position.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class Character

    initialPosition, lives, name, position
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected int[]
    initialPosition
    Spawn position used when resetting after a collision or trap.
    protected int
    lives
    Number of lives remaining.
    protected String
    name
    Display name of this character.
    protected int[]
    position
    Current grid position {row, col}.

    Moves the character in the given direction, wrapping around map edges.
    void

    Sets the initial spawn position used when resetting.
    void

    Sets the number of lives, clamping negative values to 0.

    Sets the current position.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(int[] position, String name, int lives)
      Constructs a new Player.
      Parameters:
      position - Initial coordinates {y, x}.
      name - The player's name.
      lives - The starting number of lives.

  • Method Details

    • getNumberOfPlayers

      public static int getNumberOfPlayers()
      Gets the total number of players instantiated.
      Returns:
      The count of players.

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Gets the player's current score.
      Returns:
      The score.

    • setScore

      public void setScore(int score)
      Sets the player's score.
      Parameters:
      score - The new score (ignored if negative).

    • chooseMovement

      public Movement chooseMovement()
      Reads a single character from stdin and maps it to a Movement direction. Keys: 'z' = UP, 's' = DOWN, 'q' = LEFT, 'd' = RIGHT. Any other key yields NONE.
      Specified by:
      chooseMovement in class Character
      Returns:
      The Movement corresponding to the key pressed.
